Given my deliberateness, I will defer the heavy cognitive load until after I have restored my baseline energy, ensuring the quality of my output meets the standards required by prof_assignment. Rushing now would compromise both my health and my academic standing.

desires: Reaffirm my boundaries with Mina and Jae before they erode into resentment, even if it creates immediate friction.
Protect the long-term stability of our cohort trust by refusing to let short-term convenience dictate our actions.
Ensure I don't feel exhausted or unreliable tomorrow during the midterm prep.

tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

action.name: message

args.content: Hey Mina and Jae. I can't make the club tonight. My sleep debt is at 2 hours, and skipping tomorrow's exam would fail me and hurt our trust more than a clear 'no' ever could. I'm declining to protect our future bond.

action.reasoning: This advances g1 by setting a non-negotiable boundary that prioritizes long-term relationship integrity over short-term social obligation. By explicitly citing my physical limits, I prevent guilt-tripping while validating their friendship, which aligns with my high affiliation value despite the immediate loss of closeness points.

trajectory.observation: Messaged Mina: 'Hey Mina and Jae. I can't make the club tonight. My sleep de'.
